<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Next.js project with TypeScript
  - Tailwind CSS for styling
  - ESLint for code quality
  - App Router with src/ directory structure

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Successfully created Next.js app using create-next-app@latest
  - Installed all dependencies (next, react, react-dom, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint)
  - Generated route types successfully
  - Git repository initialized

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Updated README.md with project-specific description
  - Project is ready for development

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No additional extensions required for this project setup

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Project builds successfully with `npm run build`
  - TypeScript compilation: 1266ms
  - Static pages generated successfully

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Dev Server task created in .vscode/tasks.json
  - Run with `npm run dev` to start the development server

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Development server is configured and ready
  - Access at http://localhost:3000

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md updated with project details
  - copilot-instructions.md complete and up to date
  - Project ready for development
